items.visual_description: A blue and navy striped top made of a soft knit fabric. It features an asymmetric, wide neckline that drapes off one shoulder, short dolman-style sleeves, and ruching along one side seam creating a draped effect across the torso.

overall_description: A stylish blue and navy striped top with a unique asymmetric design. It has a wide, draping neckline that can be worn off the shoulder, short dolman sleeves, and flattering ruching on the side.
